title: Auto Grindstone
description: Automatically places items into the grindstone and disenchants them for you.
body:
## What does this mod do?
> **Automatically** places items from **your inventory** into the grindstone and **removes their enchantments**, so **you don’t have to manually put items** in the grindstone to disenchant them.

> This is simply a QOL Mod which helps you in saving plenty of time, especially when you're disenchanting loads of enchanted armor/tools from the Villagers (Armorers, Toolsmiths, etc!)

## Mod Showcase: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k31uOHXJB70" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> https://discord.gg/NkWHjReMUP - My Lounge, join if you ever have any issues with one of my mods, or have mod-ideas!
